title: 10 Pcs Light Purple Artificial Gypsophila, Baby Breath Fake Flowers for Wedding Bouquet Filler, DIY Home Decor and Party Arrangements
features: 🌸 【Generous 10-Pack Bundle】 Create lush, full arrangements with this value pack of 10 artificial gypsophila stems. Each bush is meticulously crafted with multiple forks and countless hyper-realistic buds, providing unparalleled volume and a professionally designed look.

✂️ 【Effortless DIY & Customisation】 The flexible wire inside each stem allows you to bend and shape the baby's breath to your exact vision. Easily trim the stems to fit any vase or seamlessly combine them with other artificial flowers to create your own stunning, custom bouquets and crafts.

💒 【Perfect for Any Occasion & Decor】 Transform any space into an enchanting haven! These timeless fake flowers are the ideal choice for wedding centrepieces, bridal bouquets, baby showers, party decorations, or simply adding a touch of elegant charm to your home decor all year round.

🌞 【Everlasting Beauty & Zero Maintenance】 Enjoy the perpetual beauty of blooms without any upkeep! Crafted from high-quality, fade-resistant materials, these faux gypsophila will never wilt, require no water, and maintain their vibrant colour and beauty for years to come.

🎁 【Ready to Use & Versatile】 Each stem features a strong, realistic green stem and lifelike foliage. They arrive ready to be arranged in your favourite vase, making them perfect for DIY crafts, event planning, or adding a instant refresh to any room.
description: Product Description Transform Your Space with Timeless Beauty Say goodbye to wilted flowers and constant maintenance! Crafted from high-quality materials, these lifelike stems bring the beauty of real flowers into your home, event, or wedding, with zero upkeep required. Why Choose Our Faux Gypsophila? Effortless Customization & DIY Freedom A Lush, Full Look Every Time No More Fading or Wilting Ready to Display, Instant Beauty Ideal for Any Occasion Perfect for weddings, bridal showers, baby showers, parties, or enhancing your home décor, these lifelike artificial flowers bring charm to any event or space. Whether it’s a special occasion or everyday elegance, their timeless beauty brightens up your surroundings with zero maintenance required.
